creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Patrice Clement from comment #0)
Committed.  Thanks!

Please submit port updates as diffs as described in [1].  Shar files
are a bad format for port updates since they do not track file
deletions etc.  It's also not possible to see what changes are made to
the port at a glance.

[1] https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/port-upgrading.html#svn-diff
